name: agent-source-list
title: AgentSourceList
description: Collapsible list of agent response sources with title, description, and validated external links.

intent.summary: Collapsible list of agent response sources with title, description, and validated external links.
useWhen: An agent response cites external material readers may inspect.
avoidWhen: The links are ordinary body links or are not sources for the response.
accessibility: Each source uses descriptive linked text and visible supporting context.
Unsafe link schemes remain non-interactive text.
responsiveBehavior: Source titles and descriptions wrap within the response width.

consumption.complexPropertyNote: Assign these non-primitive values as JavaScript properties: items.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
